title: solx: an LLVM-based Solidity toolchain - Oleksandr Zarudnyi
description:
Oleksandr Zarudnyi from Nomic Foundation presented solx, an LLVM-based Solidity compiler for the EVM.

In his talk, Oleksandr walked us through how an LLVM-based toolchain addresses practical constraints seen in current solc pipelines and the vision going forward.
